title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: the easiest way to get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate embeddings, pull & push models, list running models, etc.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community adapter that wraps Ollama as an LLM, embeddings and chat model provider.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI): chat UI, model management, multi-user, RAG, plugins.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; offers fluent builder APIs, streaming, embeddings and tool calling.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based CLI that wraps Ollama with fuzzy model search, conversation history and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Lightweight GitHub Copilot proxy that forwards IDE completions to a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-compose
summary: Docker-Compose stack bundling Ollama, WebUI, Weaviate vector DB, Nginx and optional GPU runtime.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain to chat with local documents.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models; supports threads, slash commands and moderation.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package: JS/TS client for Ollama with full TypeScript definitions and streaming support.

title: ollama-py
summary: Official PyPI package: lightweight Python client for chat, generate, pull, push, list, delete and embeddings.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API with tokio support.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with DI-friendly interfaces, streaming, cancellation tokens and sample ASP.NET chat app.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri-based desktop GUI for Ollama (Rust backend + React frontend) with model downloads and chat.

title: ollama-dl
summary: Standalone downloader script that pulls GGUF models from Hugging Face directly into Ollama’s model cache.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset: use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds a /ollama slash command to query local models with thread support and optional approval flow.
